overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves from under an overpass through busy streets lined with neon signs, futuristic billboards, and diverse pedestrians, ending in a covered commercial walkway.

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection beneath the elevated highway
entering the shaded walkway beneath the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection and entering the sidewalk under the overpass, moving toward the shaded area beneath the elevated highway

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: large concrete and steel highway structure spanning across the street
tall modern building covered with large digital advertisements and corporate logos
tall palm tree visible against the sky near the intersection
large digital screen displaying purple and pink neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass at an urban intersection. The player crosses the asphalt street toward a shaded walkway beneath an elevated highway, passing by futuristic glass skyscrapers covered in digital billboards. Sparse vehicle traffic moves through the intersection as the environment transitions from open sky to the shadow of the highway structure.

events.description: entering deep shadow beneath the elevated highway with red neon lights visible
passing through a group of pedestrians walking in the shaded corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the shaded corridor beneath the elevated highway, passing pedestrians and neon-lit storefronts

entered.detail: green metal safety railing along the edge of the walkway
red neon light strips illuminating the building facade on the right
security fencing with barbed wire atop the right-side building

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow, shaded pedestrian corridor beneath the massive elevated highway structure. The space is lit by a mix of filtered daylight and red neon lights from adjacent buildings. Metal railings line the left side while industrial buildings with security fencing and barbed wire line the right. Pedestrians walk in both directions through this covered urban passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with neon bar signage

events.description: exiting the shaded underpass into sunlit street corner
turning right at the corner near Lizzie's Bar

agents.ego_description: exiting the underpass and turning right at the street corner, navigating around a metal fence and trash dumpster

black metal security fence with pointed tops blocking off an alleyway
large green industrial dumpster overflowing with garbage bags
vintage-style pink and white convertible parked on the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the shaded underpass into bright sunlight at a street corner. The prominent neon sign for 'Lizzie's Bar' glows on the right side of the building. The player turns right, navigating past a black metal security fence and a green trash dumpster. A distinctive pink convertible is parked along the curb as the scene opens up to a wider street view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street with parked vehicles and colorful pedestrians

events.description: encountering group of three brightly dressed NPCs standing on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past the pink convertible and approaching a group of colorful pedestrians standing near the street corner

notable_agents.action: three pedestrians with bright neon clothing and colorful hair standing and conversing on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large modern commercial building with horizontal lines and multiple levels
wide street intersection with crosswalk markings and traffic signals

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit city street past the parked pink convertible. The scene features a group of three NPCs with vibrant neon outfits and colorful hair standing on the sidewalk. The camera moves toward a wide intersection with a large gray commercial building visible across the street. The environment is bright and open with clear blue skies.

events.description: crossing the street while vehicles pass by in the background

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide city street and continuing along the sidewalk past various pedestrians and storefronts

orange and black vending machine on the sidewalk
entrance to a covered commercial walkway with green flooring visible inside

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wide asphalt street with visible crosswalk markings while vehicles drive past. The player approaches a covered walkway entrance while passing storefronts featuring Asian script signage and an orange vending machine. The street is moderately busy with pedestrians walking in the same direction, and the architecture features a mix of modern commercial buildings.

events.description: entering the covered commercial walkway with green flooring

agents.ego_description: entering the covered walkway and walking past seated pedestrians and vending machines

entered.detail: concrete overhead structure covering the pedestrian walkway with circular ventilation units

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered commercial walkway characterized by distinctive green carpet flooring and a concrete overhead structure with ventilation units. The space is illuminated by a mix of natural light from the entrance and artificial lighting from vending machines and storefronts. Pedestrians browse the area while the player moves deeper into this sheltered urban corridor, passing by illuminated signage and air conditioning equipment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the oppressive shadows of a concrete overpass into the vibrant, sun-drenched streets of a futuristic city before concluding in a sheltered commercial corridor. It begins at an urban intersection, moving from the open sky into a narrow, shaded pedestrian passage beneath an elevated highway where red neon lights clash with filtered daylight and industrial fencing. As the camera emerges from this underpass into bright sunlight, the scene opens up at a street corner marked by the glowing sign of Lizzie's Bar and a parked pink convertible. The movement continues along a wide, sunlit boulevard past colorful pedestrians and Asian script signage, crossing a busy asphalt street under a clear blue sky. Finally, the camera transitions from the open road into a covered commercial walkway, shifting from natural light to the artificial glow of vending machines and storefronts atop distinctive green carpeting.
